{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321134144EFAF2F35AB2F420F7889"}"},"total":989},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7238557778984698676","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看完了，留在脑海里的，慢慢的勾起童年时的模糊的记忆，一种似曾相识的情节，浓缩了的人生精华，不管世事变化沧桑，如何跌宕。支配人的是精神，是不屈的意志。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1685358129,"group_id":"7132071938960133151","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"画饼","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/13QhfuMsXKTMU2NFMPQx+5ycCPROvu35t+LFJ7BYT+","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/543d66da1f1d4fcbb1985aafb732744f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776618112&x-signature=awaLAimbXw3BOWSbmf%2Bc1b7%2FCas%3D","user_id":"3721217734082685","user_name":"自食其饼"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3721217734082685","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7132071938960133151","book_info":{"abstract":"【无系统、女帝、架空历史、权谋、陆地神仙】
叶峰穿越到九州大陆，扶大魏女帝上位，遭遇过河拆桥，却被大宋武痴女帝奉为座上宾，帷中客。
　　赐天子剑，封镇国君，皇权特许，先斩后奏。
       除内乱，歼外敌，建书院，推新政。
　　就这样弄着弄着，大宋皇朝就天下无敌了。
　　这个时候，普天之下的人，才终于明白，纷纷怒骂
       大魏女帝：“乱臣贼子，朕果真没冤枉你啊！”
　　仙佛界：“这个人境界高的离谱就是要吃软饭，简直是我辈修士耻辱啊？！”
　　九州江湖：“明明你都天下无敌了，求求你出手，我们不怕死，就想看看你的剑法！”
　　陆地神仙美女们：“你也不想你的秘密被陛下知道？”
　　敌国公主们：“镇国君，求求你来给我们当驸马吧？”
　　各国文豪：“这哪里是什么诗词歌赋啊？这是九州之光啊？”
　　诸多皇朝：“我们在九州争来争去，结果大宋皇朝把仙佛界都给踏平了！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/ca2427b8d4776292fbd0945f3e591b2c","author":"蓦然穹天","author_id":"","book_id":"7132071938960133151","book_name":"昏君女帝是我妻，我无敌一直苟着","book_short_name":"镇国君","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#381008","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"9454人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":258,"name":"传统玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=258&name=传统玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":378,"name":"女帝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=378&name=女帝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7132350194225513001","read_count":"9454","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1946735"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.6","serial_count":"832","tags":"传统玄幻,玄幻,架空,东方玄幻,女帝,穿越","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic-r/67435bb0ef42cc2844fcc36a8130cdc0~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779255704&x-signature=Y%2Bm4IaP1iwDUGVq%2B3VhPWvMsIj8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2362182662110206","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"64319"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321134144EFAF2F35AB2F420F7889"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读42分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count"
